input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.2.3
            TITLE: steering systems must use a rigid mechanical linkage capable of tension and compression

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.2.3: Steering systems must use a rigid mechanical linkage capable of tension and compression
V.3.2.3 Steering systems must use a rigid mechanical linkage capable of tension and compression 
loads for operation

final_answer: Steering systems must use a rigid mechanical linkage capable of tension and compression loads for operation
